description: 'A missile reaches Kyiv in 2-4 minutes' — official explains air alarm lag during Russian ballistic strikes. "All information about launches or launch preparations comes to us from our partners. ... No system can be perfect, so failures do occur, and the alert may be delayed," Defense Ministry Advisor Serhii Beskrestnov said.

Any system failure will lead to a delay in receiving information, so sometimes...

Any system failure will lead to a delay in receiving information, so sometimes...
description_uk: Баллистика долетает до Киева за 2-4 минуты, а вся информация о пусках или подготовке к ним поступает в Украину от партнеров, - Флеш Советник министра обороны Сергей Бескрестнов отметил, что основным источником информации об угрозах является спутниковое наблюдение за точками запуска и система фиксации фактов запуска. title: Airstrike attack
title_en: Airstrike attack
title_uk: Авіаційна атака
description: Russia left key military facilities in the Far North without anti-aircraft defense. This happened against the background of an intensifying campaign of attacks by our guys. "Radio Svoboda" publishes satellite images, which show that the systems were removed from several strategic objects that were previously under the protection of S-300 and S-400. The photos from July 6 show that the Rogachevo Air Base is on Novaya Zemlya...
description_en: Russia left key military facilities in the Far North without anti-aircraft defense. This happened against the background of an intensifying campaign of attacks by our guys. "Radio Svoboda" publishes satellite images, which show that the systems were removed from several strategic objects that were previously under the protection of S-300 and S-400. The photos from July 6 show that the Rogachevo Air Base is on Novaya Zemlya...
description_uk: россия оставила ключевые военные объекты на Крайнем Севере без средств противовоздушной обороны. Это произошло на фоне усиливающейся кампании атак наших ребят. "Радио Свобода" публикует спутниковые снимки, на которых видно, что системы были сняты с нескольких стратегических объектов, ранее находившихся под охраной С-300 и С-400. На снимках от 6 июля видно, что авиабаза Рогачево на Новой Земле...

description: As pressure on Crimea heats up, Sea of Azov enters Ukraine’s crosshairs Over the past nine days, Ukraine has launched a sustained drone campaign against Russian shipping in the Sea of Azov, opening a new front in its effort to “isolate Crimea” and disrupt Moscow’s military logistics and export routes. Photo: YouTube / Robert “Madyar” Brovdi.

title: Kyiv: 794 injured
title_en: Kyiv: 794 injured
title_uk: Київ: 794 поранених
description: June deadliest month for civilians in Ukraine since April 2022, U.N. says. The toll surpassed May's already-record civilian casualties, when 282 people were killed and 1,794 injured, and marked a 37% increase compared with June 2025.
description_en: June deadliest month for civilians in Ukraine since April 2022, U.N. says. The toll surpassed May's already-record civilian casualties, when 282 people were killed and 1,794 injured, and marked a 37% increase compared with June 2025.

description: Ukrainian pilots no longer need to be in the immediate vicinity of the front line. More and more Ukrainian units operate remotely in this way, including to protect the lives of soldiers, Zeit writes. This front line, in which almost nothing moves, in some places...
description_en: Ukrainian pilots no longer need to be in the immediate vicinity of the front line. More and more Ukrainian units operate remotely in this way, including to protect the lives of soldiers, Zeit writes. This front line, in which almost nothing moves, in some places...
description_uk: Украинским пилотам больше не нужно находиться в непосредственной близости от линии фронта. Все больше украинских подразделений действуют таким образом дистанционно, в том числе для защиты жизней солдат, пишет Zeit Благодаря новым разработкам дроны летают на всё большие расстояния, в результате чего растёт kill zone. Эта полоса фронта, в которой почти ничего не движется, в некоторых местах...

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported

title_uk: Київ: Повідомляється про вибухи
description: Head of Ukraine’s state-run defense giant steps down. The news follows a major controversy at Ukroboronprom, centered around a deadly explosion at one of its ammunition depots during a Russian attack on the Kyiv suburb of Vyshneve on July 6.

title: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine,...
title_en: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine,...
title_uk: 🇳 Міністр Андрій Сибіга: «Разом з першою леді України...
description: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine, Olena Zelenska, we held a fruitful meeting with UNESCO Director General Khaled El-Enani. We discussed expanding cooperation to protect education, culture, science, and freedom of expression in the face of ongoing Russian aggression." The minister expressed his gratitude to UNESCO for the initiatives to support and preserve the common cultural heritage....
description_en: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine, Olena Zelenska, we held a fruitful meeting with UNESCO Director General Khaled El-Enani. We discussed expanding cooperation to protect education, culture, science, and freedom of expression in the face of ongoing Russian aggression." The minister expressed his gratitude to UNESCO for the initiatives to support and preserve the common cultural heritage....
description_uk: 🇳 Міністр Андрій Сибіга: "Разом із Першою леді України Оленою Зеленською провели плідну зустріч із генеральним директором ЮНЕСКО Халедом Ель-Енані. Ми обговорили розширення співпраці задля захисту освіти, культури, науки та свободи вираження поглядів в умовах триваючої російської агресії". Міністр висловив вдячність ЮНЕСКО за ініціативи з підтримки та збереження спільної культурної спадщини....

They declared their support for its flagship project - the development of a joint anti-missile potential. 🗒 The goal of the coalition 🛑To build a global integrated...

They declared their support for its flagship project - the development of a joint anti-missile potential. 🗒 The goal of the coalition 🛑To build a global integrated...

Вони заявили про підтримку її флагманського проекту – розробки спільного протиракетного потенціалу. 🗒 Мета коаліції 🛑Побудувати глобальну інтегровану...
